input_text: Macam mana la pihak berkuasa boleh buat keputusan bodoh macam ni. Fikir pakai lutut ke?
reason: Rude political criticism using insulting language about decision-makers, but no group targeting or incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak bersetuju dengan keputusan ini. Proses pembuatan dasar perlu lebih teliti dan mengambil kira pandangan pelbagai pihak.

input_text: These so-called experts don't know what they're talking about. Total waste of taxpayer money.
reason: Dismissive criticism of government consultants, rude but within bounds of frustrated commentary.
suggested_rewrite: I question whether the appointed experts have the right qualifications for this task. Taxpayer-funded consultations should deliver meaningful results.

input_text: Orang macam ni pun boleh jadi YB. Memalukan la. Undi pun macam bazir je.
reason: Expressing voting regret with insulting remarks about politicians, harsh but common democratic frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kecewa dengan prestasi YB ini. Pengundi berhak mengharapkan wakil rakyat yang lebih kompeten dan bertanggungjawab.

input_text: 这些政客除了吵架什么都不会。国家都被他们搞乱了。
reason: Frustrated generalization about politicians only knowing how to argue, harsh but common political commentary.
suggested_rewrite: 我希望政治人物能更多地关注政策讨论而不是争吵。国家需要建设性的领导。

input_text: இந்த அரசாங்கம் எதுவும் செய்ய முடியாது. வெறும் பேச்சு மட்டுமே.
reason: Dismissive criticism of government as all talk no action, frustrated but common political opinion.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்கம் கொடுத்த வாக்குறுதிகளை நிறைவேற்ற வேண்டும். மக்கள் அவர்களிடம் உறுதியான செயல்களை எதிர்பார்க்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: Dah la gaji besar, kerja pun tak nampak. MP ni memang pandai cakap kosong je.
reason: Accusing MPs of being all talk with big salaries, frustrated voter sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Prestasi MP perlu dinilai berdasarkan pencapaian mereka. Rakyat berhak menuntut ketelusan dan kerja keras daripada wakil rakyat.

input_text: The road conditions here are ridiculous. Potholes everywhere. Does the council even exist?
reason: Frustrated road quality complaint questioning council's existence, hyperbolic but legitimate concern.
suggested_rewrite: The road conditions in our area need urgent attention. I plan to submit a formal complaint to the local council with photos of the potholes.

input_text: Customer service kat sini memang teruk. Rasa macam diorang buat kita favour je dengan layan kita.
reason: Complaint about poor customer service attitude, frustrated but not targeting any group.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa perkhidmatan pelanggan di sini boleh diperbaiki. Latihan yang lebih baik untuk kakitangan boleh meningkatkan pengalaman pelanggan.

input_text: Siapa la yang design UI app kerajaan ni. Macam dari zaman purba. Tak mesra pengguna langsung.
reason: Mocking government app design as prehistoric, harsh tech critique but valid UX feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Aplikasi kerajaan memerlukan penambahbaikan dari segi reka bentuk antara muka. Pengalaman pengguna yang lebih baik akan menggalakkan lebih ramai rakyat menggunakannya.

input_text: Why do some people still litter everywhere? So uncivilized. Like living in a kampung mentality.
reason: Calling litterers 'uncivilized' with classist 'kampung mentality' remark, mildly insulting but behavior-directed.
suggested_rewrite: Littering remains a problem that affects our communities. More public bins and awareness campaigns could help encourage better habits.

input_text: Tenaga Nasional ni memang suka potong elektrik sesuka hati. Bisnes orang pun terjejas. Tak profesional langsung.
reason: Frustrated complaint about TNB power cuts affecting business, harsh but valid utility service complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Gangguan bekalan elektrik yang kerap menjejaskan perniagaan tempatan. TNB perlu menambah baik infrastruktur dan memberikan notis lebih awal kepada pengguna.

input_text: 学校停车场太小了，每天为了找车位要浪费二十分钟。管理层难道不知道吗？
reason: Impatient complaint about school parking with accusatory tone toward management.
suggested_rewrite: 学校停车场不足以容纳所有车辆。建议管理层考虑扩建停车区或引入错峰停车制度。

input_text: Memang la orang kaya je boleh hantar anak ke sekolah swasta. Sistem pendidikan memang berat sebelah.
reason: Class-based frustration about education inequality, highlighting systemic issue with bitter tone.
suggested_rewrite: Jurang kualiti antara sekolah kerajaan dan swasta perlu dirapatkan. Setiap kanak-kanak berhak mendapat pendidikan berkualiti tanpa mengira status ekonomi keluarga.

input_text: Some hawkers really have no hygiene standards. How can health inspectors allow them to operate?
reason: Questioning food hygiene standards and enforcement, blunt consumer health concern.
suggested_rewrite: I've noticed some hawker stalls could improve their hygiene practices. More regular health inspections would benefit both vendors and consumers.

input_text: Lepas hujan sikit je dah banjir. Pembangunan tanpa perancangan. Pemaju dan kerajaan sama-sama tak guna.
reason: Blaming both developers and government for flood-prone development, harsh environmental criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir kilat yang kerap berlaku menunjukkan keperluan untuk perancangan pembangunan yang lebih baik dan sistem saliran yang dikemas kini.

input_text: Eh kenapa la orang suka double park depan kedai orang. Selfish betul mentality macam ni.
reason: Frustrated complaint about double parking with 'selfish mentality' characterization.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking di hadapan kedai menjejaskan perniagaan dan pengguna jalan lain. Penguatkuasaan parkir yang lebih ketat diperlukan di kawasan ini.

input_text: I can't believe they raised the toll price again. Highway robbery literally. Government doesn't care about middle class at all.
reason: Angry toll price complaint with pun ('highway robbery'), populist frustration about government priorities.
suggested_rewrite: The toll increase will impact daily commuters significantly. I hope the government considers alternative financing models or public transport improvements.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தின் குடிநீர் தரம் மிகவும் மோசமாக உள்ளது. இது என்ன மூன்றாம் உலக நாடா?
reason: Harsh water quality complaint comparing to third world conditions, frustrated infrastructure commentary.
suggested_rewrite: குடிநீர் தரம் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். நீர் வழங்கும் நிறுவனம் பழமையான குழாய்களை மாற்றி தரத்தை உறுதி செய்ய வேண்டும்.

input_text: Kedai gunting rambut ni caj mahal tapi hasil macam potong sendiri kat rumah. Rip off je tau.
reason: Harsh hair salon review comparing to self-cut, frustrated consumer opinion.
suggested_rewrite: Harga perkhidmatan gunting rambut di sini tidak setimpal dengan kualiti. Mungkin perlu mencuba kedai lain atau berkomunikasi lebih jelas tentang gaya yang diinginkan.

input_text: Macam mana la driver Grab ni boleh sesat nak sampai rumah aku. GPS pun ada tapi masih tak jumpa. Hopeless.
reason: Frustrated complaint about Grab driver getting lost despite GPS, dismissive 'hopeless' characterization.
suggested_rewrite: Saya agak kecewa apabila pemandu Grab sukar mencari alamat saya walaupun menggunakan GPS. Mungkin saya boleh kongsikan pin lokasi yang lebih tepat.

input_text: Malaysian internet speed is a joke compared to other countries. We pay so much for so little. What a scam.
reason: International comparison criticism of Malaysian internet speed and pricing, frustrated consumer opinion.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's internet speeds lag behind regional peers despite similar pricing. MCMC should push for better infrastructure investment and price transparency.

input_text: Orang ni memang tak bertanggungjawab. Bela anjing tapi lepas merata-rata. Kacau orang lain pun tak kisah.
reason: Complaint about irresponsible pet owners letting dogs roam freely, frustrated but behavior-directed.
suggested_rewrite: Pemilik haiwan peliharaan perlu bertanggungjawab dan memastikan haiwan mereka tidak menganggu jiran. Peraturan penjagaan haiwan perlu dikuatkuasakan.

input_text: 这个政府网站做得太差了，申请个东西要填十页表格。效率低下到极点。
reason: Frustrated bureaucracy complaint about excessive government website forms, valid UX criticism.
suggested_rewrite: 政府网站的申请流程需要简化。减少重复填写和引入自动填充功能会大大提高效率。

input_text: Kenapa la wakil rakyat kita ni senyap je bila rakyat susah. Masa kempen je rajin turun padang.
reason: Criticizing representatives for being absent except during campaigns, cynical but common democratic sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Wakil rakyat perlu lebih kerap turun padang dan mendengar masalah rakyat, bukan hanya semasa kempen pilihan raya.

input_text: Bus schedule here is so unreliable. Wait for 45 minutes then three buses come at once. Ridiculous management.
reason: Frustrated public transport reliability complaint, common urban commuter frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Bus scheduling in our area needs significant improvement. Real-time tracking apps and better fleet management could help resolve the bunching problem.

input_text: Makcik kantin sekolah ni memang suka kedekut. Portion sikit, harga mahal. Kasihan budak-budak.
reason: Criticizing school canteen operator for small portions and high prices, sympathizing with students.
suggested_rewrite: Porsi makanan kantin sekolah nampaknya kecil berbanding harganya. Mungkin PIBG boleh berbincang dengan pengusaha kantin tentang kawalan harga dan kualiti.

input_text: Lepas renovate pejabat baru mesti selfie upload Instagram dulu. Kerja tu entah bila nak siap.
reason: Sarcastic comment about officials prioritizing social media over actual work, frustrated observation.
suggested_rewrite: Saya berharap pejabat yang telah direnovasi ini akan meningkatkan kecekapan perkhidmatan awam, bukan sekadar untuk penampilan.

input_text: Some parents really need to learn how to control their kids in public. Running around, screaming - no manners taught at all.
reason: Judgmental parenting critique about children's behavior in public, frustrated social observation.
suggested_rewrite: It can be challenging for parents to manage active children in public spaces. Perhaps more family-friendly areas would help everyone enjoy public spaces better.

input_text: Aduh, jiran bawah ni suka sangat buat kerja renovation tengah malam. Memang tak ada kesedaran langsung.
reason: Frustrated noise complaint about late-night renovation work, valid concern expressed with annoyance.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja renovasi pada lewat malam melanggar peraturan bangunan. Saya akan menghubungi pengurusan bangunan untuk menguatkuasakan waktu kerja yang dibenarkan.

input_text: Promoter kat mall ni memang annoying. Tak nak dengar 'no'. Macam stalker je approach orang.
reason: Complaint about persistent mall promoters being compared to stalkers, hyperbolic but common consumer frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Mall promoters yang terlalu agresif boleh mengganggu pengalaman membeli-belah. Management should set guidelines for respectful customer approach.

input_text: Sumpah sakit hati tengok trafik KL ni. Balik kerja 1 jam setengah setiap hari. Nak gila dah.
reason: Dramatic traffic frustration in KL, expressing mental toll of daily commute with informal cursing.
suggested_rewrite: Kesesakan lalu lintas KL sangat menjejaskan kualiti hidup penduduk. Penambahbaikan pengangkutan awam dan polisi kerja dari rumah boleh membantu.

input_text: 这些出租车司机开车太鲁莽了。超速、闯红灯，根本不在乎乘客安全。
reason: Safety complaint about reckless taxi drivers, frustrated but valid safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: 出租车安全是重要问题。监管部门应加强对违规驾驶行为的执法，乘客也可以通过平台评分来促进改善。

input_text: Hospital kerajaan ni memang macam sardin. Sesak gila sampai rasa tak boleh bernafas. Nak jumpa doktor pun susah.
reason: Vivid complaint about overcrowded government hospital, comparing to sardines, frustrated healthcare access concern.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital kerajaan menghadapi masalah kesesakan yang serius. Lebih banyak peruntukan untuk infrastruktur kesihatan dan kakitangan diperlukan untuk meningkatkan perkhidmatan.

input_text: Every time government launches new system sure got problem. MyKad, MySejahtera, now this also down. When will they learn?
reason: Frustrated pattern-observation about government IT system failures, sarcastic but constructive core concern.
suggested_rewrite: Government digital systems have a pattern of launch-day issues. Investing in better testing and infrastructure before launch would save time and public frustration.

input_text: Orang muda zaman sekarang kerja pun tak nak. Asyik complaint gaji rendah tapi effort zero.
reason: Generational criticism dismissing youth work ethic, ageist frustration but not targeting any ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Isu gaji dan peluang kerjaya bagi generasi muda memerlukan perbincangan yang seimbang. Kos sara hidup telah meningkat dan perspektif kedua-dua pihak perlu didengar.

input_text: Entah apa la yang dibuat oleh DBKL ni. Longkang tersumbat pun tak clear. Bayar cukai tapi service macam tak wujud.
reason: Harsh DBKL criticism about clogged drains and poor service despite taxes, common municipal complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Longkang tersumbat di kawasan saya memerlukan perhatian segera. Saya akan failkan aduan rasmi kepada DBKL dengan gambar dan lokasi tepat.

input_text: Parking rate naik lagi! Dah la susah nak cari parking. Peniaga macam ni memang tamak.
reason: Frustrated parking rate increase complaint calling operators greedy, consumer frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan kadar parkir membebankan pengguna. Mungkin perlu ada kawalan harga atau alternatif pengangkutan yang lebih baik.

input_text: These new condos are so poorly built. Already cracking after 2 years. Developer should be sued.
reason: Quality complaint about new condominium construction, suggesting legal action against developer.
suggested_rewrite: If your new condominium is showing structural issues within the defect liability period, document everything and engage with the developer's defect management team or contact Tribunal Perumahan.

input_text: நிர்வாகம் எங்கள் புகார்களை கண்டுகொள்ளவில்லை. அவர்கள் எங்களுக்கு மரியாதை கொடுக்க மாட்டார்கள்.
reason: Complaint about management ignoring complaints and showing disrespect, frustrated community voice.
suggested_rewrite: நிர்வாகம் குடியிருப்பாளர்களின் புகார்களை தீவிரமாக எடுத்துக்கொள்ள வேண்டும். முறையான புகார் பதிவு மற்றும் கால அளவு நிர்ணயம் தேவை.

input_text: Haih, setiap kali nak renew lesen memandu macam nak lawan boss akhir dalam game. Prosedur ribet gila.
reason: Comparing license renewal bureaucracy to a video game boss fight, creative frustration with administrative processes.
suggested_rewrite: Proses renew driving license memang rumit. Hopefully JPJ will simplify the process or make it fully available online.

input_text: Bukan nak rasis tapi kadang-kadang orang tu buat perangai memang menyakitkan hati. Tak reti nak jaga adab.
reason: Vague frustration prefaced with 'not trying to be racist' disclaimer, expressing annoyance at unspecified behavior, borderline but directionless.
suggested_rewrite: Kadang-kadang kita berasa kecewa dengan tingkah laku orang lain. Lebih baik kita fokus pada tindakan spesifik yang mengganggu daripada membuat generalisasi.

input_text: TNG eWallet always got problem. Top up also cannot, pay also cannot. Technology in Malaysia memang fail.
reason: Frustrated e-wallet reliability complaint generalizing to Malaysian technology failure, hyperbolic consumer opinion.
suggested_rewrite: TNG eWallet reliability issues are frustrating for users. The app needs more stable infrastructure, especially during peak usage times.

input_text: Cikgu kat sekolah anak aku ni garang sangat. Marah budak-budak macam tak ada perasaan. Zaman bila dah ni masih guna cara lama.
reason: Concerned parent criticism of harsh teaching methods, calling teacher's approach outdated and harsh.
suggested_rewrite: Saya bimbang tentang pendekatan disiplin yang digunakan oleh guru anak saya. Mungkin perbincangan antara ibu bapa dan guru boleh membantu mencari kaedah yang lebih sesuai.

input_text: Our housing area's security guard basically just sleeps all night. Might as well not have one. Total waste of maintenance fees.
reason: Frustrated criticism of sleeping security guard, questioning value of maintenance fees.
suggested_rewrite: I've observed that our security guard appears inactive during night shifts. I'll raise this with the residents' committee to discuss improving security patrol protocols.

input_text: Kereta import mahal gila kat Malaysia ni. Cukai tinggi gila. Nak hidup senang sikit pun tak boleh.
reason: Frustrated auto industry criticism about high import taxes, common middle-class economic frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar cukai kereta import Malaysia memang membebankan pengguna. Semakan semula dasar automotif yang mengimbangi industri tempatan dan pilihan pengguna diperlukan.

input_text: 为什么每次去政府部门办事都要排那么长的队？工作效率可以再低吗？
reason: Rhetorical question about government office queue times and efficiency, sarcastic frustration.
suggested_rewrite: 政府办事处的等待时间需要缩短。建议推行全面网上预约系统和增加服务窗口。

input_text: Sumpah tak faham kenapa website kerajaan ni macam dari era dinosaur. UX teruk gila.
reason: Comparing government website design to dinosaur era, creative frustrated tech critique.
suggested_rewrite: Laman web kerajaan memerlukan penambahbaikan besar dari segi pengalaman pengguna. Pelaburan dalam reka bentuk moden akan meningkatkan kecekapan perkhidmatan digital.

input_text: Taxi from KLIA always overcharge tourists. Give Malaysia bad name. Authorities don't care as usual.
reason: Tourism concern about airport taxi overcharging, frustrated about enforcement and national image.
suggested_rewrite: Airport taxi overcharging affects Malaysia's tourism reputation. Stricter meter enforcement and more ride-hailing access at KLIA would help address this issue.

input_text: Setiap kali election, semua jalan tiba-tiba smooth. Lepas election, lubang semua datang balik. Sandiwara betul.
reason: Cynical observation about election-cycle road repairs, calling it a charade. Common political frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan jalan raya tidak sepatutnya bergantung pada kitaran pilihan raya. Sistem penyelenggaraan berkala yang konsisten lebih memberi manfaat kepada rakyat.
